text: It seems that some people are getting an early start to next year’s election
campaigning. I have found some people have a strategy of repeating wrong
information and key phrases. I guess they believe if you say something enough
times, others will believe it’s true.
Despite some current members of council already indicating their intentions publicly
at the council table for next year’s election, I will hold off until the appropriate time
to share my plans for the future.
In the meantime, I will attempt to address inaccurate information that is being
spread about me as well as tactics I believe are being used to attempt to break my
spirit and discredit me. I don’t believe in hiding other people’s bad behavior nor will
I be bullied. You may see me struggle at times, that’s life, but I can tell you, you

My reason for posting this article is not because I get upset or lose sleep over this,
but quite simply to set the record straight. If you hear a story about me and want
the truth please just give me a call. My life is pretty normal, I enjoy my family,
friends, and council duties……there are no secrets or hidden agendas.
I have received numerous calls from people on a regular basis wanting to share bits
and pieces of information they have that they feel are pertinent to situations
occurring in our community. I would strongly suggest that if you have information
that should be shared due to what you believe to be illegal or criminal activity,
Our town has become divided during this term of council. To those who support me
thank you. I would ask that you continue to stick to the facts and keep informed by
attending council meetings. Those who wish to tarnish someone’s name will
continue to share untruths……..it’s up to you to determine what you believe.
